title: Pop UP-DOWNtown
content: Wear your green and celebrate St. Patrick's Day at Pop UP-DOWNtown in Biloxi! Enjoy an evening of live music by The Network, local food vendors, and a festive atmosphere at City Hall Plaza. This free monthly event brings the community together in the heart of downtown Biloxi.

title: Ship Island Excursions 100th Anniversary Season
content: Celebrate 100 years of Ship Island Excursions! Since 1926, the ferry has taken visitors to the pristine shores of Ship Island and the historic Fort Massachusetts. Board the ferry in Gulfport for a scenic ride across the Mississippi Sound to one of the most beautiful barrier islands on the Gulf Coast. Enjoy swimming, shelling, and exploring the Civil War-era fort.

title: Biloxi Shuckers Opening Day
content: The Biloxi Shuckers kick off their 2026 season at Keesler Federal Park! Enjoy America's pastime with Gulf Coast flair — great ballpark food, family fun zones, and exciting Double-A baseball action under the lights. Come early for pre-game festivities and opening day celebrations.

title: Taste of South Mississippi
content: Sample dishes from the region's top restaurants while socializing and bidding in a lively silent auction. This popular annual event benefits the Kroc Center's scholarship fund, supporting community programs across the Gulf Coast. A delicious evening for a great cause.

title: Gulf Coast Fair
content: The Gulf Coast Fair returns to the Mississippi Coast Coliseum with thrilling midway rides, delicious fair food, games, and attractions for the entire family. From classic carnival rides to live entertainment, the Gulf Coast Fair is one of the biggest annual events on the coast. Bring the whole family for a day (or night) of fun!

title: CLASH Endurance Coastal Mississippi Triathlon
content: CLASH Endurance brings world-class triathlon racing to Gulfport! This multi-day event features the USA Triathlon Collegiate Club National Championships alongside age group triathlons and duathlons. Athletes from across the country will swim, bike, and run along the beautiful Gulf Coast. Spectators welcome — cheer on the athletes at Jones Park!

title: D'Iberville BBQ Festival
content: A free, family-friendly celebration of barbecue in D'Iberville! Watch pitmasters compete in the BBQ cook-off, enjoy live music, and cast your vote for the best barbecue on the Gulf Coast. Local vendors, kids' activities, and plenty of smoked meats make this a can't-miss spring event.

title: Mississippi Gulf Coast Kennel Club Dog Show
content: The Mississippi Gulf Coast Kennel Club hosts its annual dog show at the Harrison County Fairgrounds. Watch breeds from around the region compete in conformation, agility, and obedience events. A fun outing for dog lovers of all ages!

title: Gulf Coast Grand Prix
content: Formula One Powerboat Championship races roar across the Mississippi Sound in Biloxi! Between high-speed races, enjoy a Cajun street party along the beach, a boat parade, and live entertainment. This exciting three-day event brings world-class powerboat racing to the Gulf Coast.

title: Crawfish Music Festival
content: Biloxi's annual Crawfish Music Festival combines the best of Gulf Coast cuisine and live music. Enjoy a crawfish cook-off, live musical performances from regional artists, cold drinks, and all the boiled crawfish you can eat. A perfect spring weekend on the Mississippi Gulf Coast!
